name: request
info: Applies the selected profile proxy settings, disables TLS certificate verification for NetBox calls, and performs the HTTP request.

payload:
{"callback_url":"https://registry.hub.docker.com/u/saashup/curio.city/hook/e516e7b77b86461aa659013befa31d39/","push_data":{"pusher":"saashup","pushed_at":1773402989,"tag":"v0.34.0","images":[],"media_type":"application/vnd.docker.container.image.v1+json"},"repository":{"status":"Active","namespace":"saashup","name":"curio.city","repo_name":"saashup/curio.city","repo_url":"https://hub.docker.com/r/saashup/curio.city","description":"","full_description":"# Curio.city — Guide

Instance for every guide \o/

## Development
To start the development server run:
```bash
bun run dev
```

Open http://localhost:3000/ with your browser to see the result.

## E2E Tests

We use [Playwright](https://playwright.dev/) as E2E tests runner.

Run the tests:

1. Be sure your have project dependencies installed with `bun install`
2. Install headless browsers packages `bunx playwright install`
3. Start the Guide instance `bun run dev`
4. Exec the tests `bunx --bun playwright test tests/dom/`

","star_count":0,"is_private":true,"is_trusted":false,"is_official":false,"owner":"saashup","date_created":1723641910}}
